improvements: 1. [Security/T1] Fixed path-traversal vulnerability in get_sql() - now validates resolved path stays within sql/ directory
2. [Tests/T2] Added 39-test pytest suite (tests/test_pipeline.py + tests/test_sql_meta.py) covering security, data validation, and integration
3. [Quality/T3] Added load_sample_reviews() NDJSON parser and validate_review() with type hints, logging, and field/range validation
4. [Quality/T3] Added sql_meta.py module for extracting table/stream/task/procedure/warehouse/sequence names from DDL scripts
5. [DX/T4] Added .github/workflows/ci.yml running tests on Python 3.9, 3.11, 3.12 matrix
6. [DX/T4] Added .env.example with all required Snowflake and AWS environment variables
7. [DX/T4] Added requirements.txt and updated pyproject.toml with pytest/ruff configuration sections
8. [DX/T4] Added .gitignore covering __pycache__, *.egg-info, dist, .env, .venv
9. [DX/T4] Secured Dockerfile: non-root appuser, HEALTHCHECK, removed snowflake.txt from image
10. [Tests/T2] Extended test suite to 43 tests (4 new sql_meta tests for summarize, dedup, case-insensitive)
11. [Quality/T3] Added ruff>=0.4 to requirements.txt for consistent linting
